items.title: Anthropic double opsec failure leaks Claude Mythos and exposes KAIROS/BUDDY
items.summary: Anthropic suffered two opsec failures in five days: Claude Mythos leaked via CMS and KAIROS/BUDDY/undercover-mode exposed via npm. Reveals systemic internal controls failure at DoD-adjacent AI lab.
